sharedPost.text:
Met a bunch of WONDERFUL ladies yesterday to celebrate Jade’s Last Rodeo! The theme for this session was “Dirty Dancing” but I can cater to pretty much any event or theme and provide a class for varied ability levels. 90 minutes of dance, fun and plenty of giggles. 🤣🎉 Thank you for such a great time ladies. Was my absolute pleasure to spend time in the studio with you! 🥰💃🕺🪩
.
.
#henparty #lastrodeo #henweekend #henpartyideas #dirtydancing

sharedPost.text:
@everyone

CANNIBALS WANTED!

Exciting news, everyone!

We’re looking for volunteers to join us for one of the biggest and most atmospheric sequences in The Eight Saga: N.E.S.T. Project , our Cannibal Camp scenes filming in Chester on the 10th, 11th, 12th, and 13th of June.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, creative, or simply someone who wants to be part of an ambitious independent feature film, we’d love to have you with us.

This is a volunteer production powered by an incredible community of passionate creatives. What we may lack in budget, we make up for with dedication, professionalism, creativity, and an unforgettable experience. With over 200 creatives involved in the project, this is a fantastic opportunity to gain experience, build your portfolio, network with like-minded people, and become part of something special.

Bring your own tent.
Bring your own post.
apocalyptic,cannibal-style costume if possible.
Meet fellow creatives and filmmakers.
Gain hands on feature film experience.

Can’t make all four days? No problem! Even joining us for a single day is a huge help and greatly appreciated.

Come for the filmmaking, stay for the adventure, the stories, and the community.

If you’d like to be involved, let us know below or send us a message.

See you in the wasteland.

#NESTProject #IndependentFilm #FeatureFilm #Filmmaking #VolunteerActors #FilmCommunity #PostApocalyptic #BehindTheScenes #ChesterFilming

items.text:
Hey All - looking for a few Supporting Artists/Background actors for an upcoming short film next weekend, I'll leave all details below:

ROLE: **Young Males (20-30) as part of a gang of thugs**

Location: **South London**

Date: **13-14th June (Half day 13th, full day 14th)**

This is expenses only unfortunately, but we'll feed and water you for ur troubles + pay for any travel expenses to set. If this seems like something you'd be up for, email:

**acrowdedplc@gmail.com**

With a headshot + a line of any experience you've got.

items.text:
I'm a little bit cross...
Both the last LOL Factory Weekender and this one have been filled mainly by NON-ACTORS. 😂
Which confuses me.
Because if you're an actor, what is the ONE thing that stands out most on a CV?
The thing that gets talked about when you're not in the room?
The thing that instantly says confidence, bravery, timing, quick thinking and presence?
Stand-up comedy.
Yet members of the public seem more willing to throw themselves into something terrifying than some actors do. 👀
That's worrying.
Actors are supposed to be the people who run towards discomfort, not away from it.
And before anyone says, "I wouldn't know where to start..."
You'll be taught by award-winning comedian Jed Salisbury – a two-time Best MC winner at the Yorkshire Comedy Awards and part of the team behind Dave's Spirit of the Fringe Award-winning Best in Class.
The good news?
There are still places available.
So if you've been sitting there thinking, "I'd love to do that, but..."
This is your sign to stop the sentence there.
See you on the 27th. 🎤🔥
https://buy.stripe.com/14A28r5bs5pZ5aw0oi4gg0y
#ActorsLife�#StandUpComedy�#CastingDirectors�#ActingCareer�#ComfortZone

items.summary:
I'm a little bit cross...
Both the last LOL Factory Weekender and this one have been filled mainly by NON-ACTORS. 😂
Which confuses me.
Because if you're an actor, what is the ONE thing that stands out most on a CV?
The thing that gets talked about when you're not in the room?
The thing that instantly says confidence, bravery, timing, quick thinking and presence?
Stand-up comedy.
Yet members of the public seem more willing to throw themselves into something terrifying than some actors do. 👀
That's worrying.
Actors are supposed to be the people who run towards discomfort, not away from it.
And before anyone says, "I wouldn't know where to start..."
You'll be taught by award-winning comedian Jed Salisbury – a two-time Best MC winner at the Yorkshire Comedy Awards and part of the team behind Dave's Spirit of the Fringe Award-winning Best in Class.
The good news?
There are still places available.
So if you've been sitting there thinking, "I'd love to do that, but..."
This is your sign to stop the sentence there.
See you on the 27th. 🎤🔥
https://buy.stripe.com/14A28r5bs5pZ5aw0oi4gg0y
#ActorsLife�#StandUpComedy�#CastingDirectors�#ActingCareer�#ComfortZone

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL – HER FIGHT TO CHOOSE (Indie Faith-Based Film)
Production Company: RRJ Productions LLC
Project Title: Her Fight To Choose
Producer/Writer: Rochelle Johnson
Director: John Morgan
Production Type: Independent/Faith-Based/Motivational
Filming Location: Cahokia Heights, IL
Filming Dates: September 2026

Compensation: Compensation will be discussed with selected actors based on role,
experience, and final budget allocation. All cast members will receive IMDb credit and
meals during assigned filming days.

ABOUT THE FILM:
Raised between her grandmother's unwavering faith and a violent home that taught her to
trust only herself, a woman who loses everything must choose what she truly believes
before despair claims her life.

CHELLE (ADULT)

Lead Role

Gender: Female
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: 30s

Character Description

A successful and independent professional who learned early to trust only herself. After devastating personal losses, she faces a spiritual and emotional crisis that forces her to confront grief, childhood trauma, and questions of faith.

Personality Traits

* Independent
* Intelligent
* Guarded
* Determined
* Emotionally wounded

Actor Notes

Requires exceptional dramatic range and the ability to portray grief, vulnerability, strength, and spiritual conflict.

⸻

CHELLE (CHILD)

Lead Supporting Role

Gender: Female
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: 8–10

Character Description

An intelligent and observant child growing up in a violent and unstable home. Struggles to reconcile faith and hope with the painful realities around her.

Personality Traits

* Sensitive
* Smart
* Observant
* Thoughtful
* Resilient

Actor Notes

Strong emotional depth and natural acting ability required.

⸻

REE

Supporting

Gender: Female
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: 30s (Flashbacks)

Character Description

A loving mother trapped in an abusive relationship. Exhausted by life’s challenges but fiercely protective of her children.

Personality Traits

* Loving
* Protective
* Worn Down
* Resourceful
* Determined

⸻

TANYA (CHILD)

Supporting

Gender: Female
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: 7–9

Character Description

Chelle’s younger sister. Funny, fearless, and outspoken despite growing up in difficult circumstances.

Personality Traits

* Funny
* Bold
* Fearless
* Energetic
* Resilient

⸻

TANYA (ADULT)

Supporting

Gender: Female
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: Early 30s

Character Description

A successful educator and assistant principal who serves as a contrast to Chelle’s emotional isolation.

Personality Traits

* Direct
* Witty
* Confident
* Healthy
* Compassionate

⸻

JAZ

Major Supporting

Gender: Female
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: 9–11

Character Description

Chelle’s daughter. Quietly observant and emotionally perceptive, often speaking truths adults struggle to face.

Personality Traits

* Smart
* Loving
* Honest
* Empathetic
* Observant

⸻

HW

Major Supporting / Antagonist

Gender: Male
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: 40–50

Character Description

An abusive alcoholic whose volatility creates fear and instability within the household.

Personality Traits

* Controlling
* Volatile
* Dangerous
* Intimidating
* Manipulative

Actor Notes

Must portray realistic menace without becoming cartoonish or stereotypical.

⸻

CHRIS (CHILD)

Supporting

Gender: Male
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: 5–6

Character Description

The youngest sibling. Innocent and largely unaware of the depth of the family turmoil around him.

Personality Traits

* Innocent
* Curious
* Playful
* Loving

⸻

CHRIS (ADULT)

Supporting

Gender: Male
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: 20s

Character Description

Chelle’s younger brother. Loving but emotionally detached from family responsibilities because of accumulated grief and loss.

Personality Traits

* Caring
* Detached
* Quiet
* Independent

⸻

AUNT BRENDA

Supporting

Gender: Female
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: 50s

Character Description

A trusted family matriarch and nurse who provides comfort, wisdom, and emotional stability during difficult moments.

Personality Traits

* Warm
* Wise
* Nurturing
* Dependable
* Observant

Actor Notes

Must communicate empathy and strength through subtle performance.

⸻

AUNT ORA

Supporting

Gender: Female
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: 50s

Character Description

Deeply rooted in faith and determined to remind her family of God’s presence even during tragedy.

Personality Traits

* Faithful
* Optimistic
* Encouraging
* Resilient
* Spiritual

Actor Notes

Should radiate authentic warmth and conviction.

⸻

AUNT DOROTHY

Supporting

Gender: Female
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: 55–75

Character Description

A quiet source of stability who opens her home and heart when Chelle reaches one of the lowest points in her life.

Personality Traits

* Patient
* Supportive
* Protective
* Compassionate
* Humble

Actor Notes

Needs strong emotional subtlety and warmth.

⸻

MALE TENANT

Supporting

Gender: Male
Ethnicity: African American
Age Range: 45–65

Character Description

A longtime tenant struggling with alcoholism and responsibility who has neglected both the property and his obligations.

Personality Traits

* Defensive
* Stubborn
* Irritable
* Guarded

Actor Notes

Strong character actor role requiring realism and emotional weariness.

⸻

JUDGE

Supporting

Gender: Male or Female
Ethnicity: Any
Age Range: 50–75

Character Description

A seasoned bankruptcy court judge who becomes an unexpected turning point in Chelle’s journey.

Personality Traits

* Intelligent
* Fair
* Compassionate
* Professional
* Authoritative

Actor Notes

Must project wisdom, authority, and humanity.

⸻

MS. WOODS

Supporting

Gender: Female
Ethnicity: Any (African American preferred)
Age Range: 28–50

Character Description

A caring elementary school teacher who recognizes emotional struggles in both Jaz and Chelle before others do.

Personality Traits

* Caring
* Perceptive
* Honest
* Patient
* Protective

Actor Notes

Must balance warmth, professionalism, and authenticity.

Email me at johnmrgn89@gmail.com

Text/Call at 580-749-0065

Audition Submission Requirements

* Headshot
* Resume
* Demo Reel (if available)
* Self-Tape

items.text:
After signing a consent form at a therapist’s office, a teenage girl begins forgetting parts of her life after every session. At the same time, a man receives the memories being taken from her through the therapist. As her memories fade and strange gaps begin appearing in her life, she slowly starts losing her sense of self.

The link to sign up for cast is: https://forms.gle/dCxGNpKtVW8cmfBh8

Filming is in Lower Hutt in early July.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says "CAST CALLOUTS If If you are interested in acting in a student led upcoming short film THIS IS YOUR SIGN You dont need experience to act as long as you have the passion. Fill out the form in the description any time before the 20 June 2026. If you have any questions or cant find the link, email: ajonesOlechilton.school.nz and smooar@chilton.school.nz. Please note that this is a student crew and not paid but food will be provided α insta: @asproductions2026 a + S productions"

items.text:
STAFFING IN CHARLESTON, SC!
Branded Promo Talent, a leading experiential marketing agency, is seeking reliable, enthusiastic, and professional Brand Ambassadors to represent TD Bank at Juneteenth on the Yard in Charleston, SC!

Date & Time:

Friday, June 19, 2026

8:30 AM - 5:00 PM

Location:

International African American Museum

14 Wharfside Street

Charleston, SC 29401

Compensation:

Team Lead - $35/per hour

BAs ‐ $30/per hour

—1099, paid weekly—

Attire:

Branded t-shirts will be provided. Black shorts or slacks (no jeans, must be length appropriate, no rips) and black comfortable gym shoes.

Event Details:

TD Bank is proud to sponsor Juneteenth on the Yard at the International African American Museum. Our event team will proudly represent TD Bank throughout the celebration while supporting a fun, welcoming, and community-focused experience that honors culture, connection, and inclusion.

Staff Duties:

• Create a fun, engaging, and positive atmosphere for all attendees.

• Help drive traffic to the activation through enthusiastic and professional interaction.

• Distribute branded giveaways and support games, activities, and guest experiences.

• Assist with overall event execution while helping maintain a clean and welcoming space.

• Proudly represent TD Bank’s commitment to diversity, inclusion, culture, and community.

Staff Expectations:

We want high-energy, outgoing, and engaging Brand Ambassadors who know how to hype a crowd and create great vibes. You must be punctual, professional, and ready to bring it from start to finish!

Application Process:

To be considered, email chrissy@brandedpromotalent.com with the following:

• Availability

• Resume

• Headshot

• Relevant experience

• A brief description of why you’re an excellent fit for this role.

Please use "Juneteenth on the Yard - Charleston, SC" as the subject of your email.

Note: Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered. Our team will review qualifications via email and schedule a call with eligible candidates.

Hi! I am a Brazilian professional model with experience in fashion, commercial, and creative photography. I am currently spending a short period of time in Poland, based in the Cieszyn area, but I am available to travel to Kraków, Warsaw, and other nearby locations.

I am primarily looking opportunities; however, I am also open to collaborating on high-quality photo shoots that can enhance my portfolio and involve experienced professionals.

Please feel free to contact me if you believe we could be a good match for a project.

https://www.instagram.com/who.is.elis?igsh=MWoxNGhsM2kzNW9iOA%3D%3D&utm_source=qr

items.text:
☠️ Listen up, ya landlubbers...

We're buildin' a cast. We're buildin' a crew. And we're buildin' a movie.

If you've ever wanted to act, run camera, make content, tell stories, or just be part of somethin' bigger than yourself...

Now's the time to climb aboard.

🎬 Tomorrow • 6:30 PM
📍 Colorado Media School

4380 S Syracuse St Suite 400, Denver, CO 80237

No fancy Hollywood nonsense.

Just good people makin' movies.

🌐 https://movieteam.site/

The tide waits for no pirate.

items.text:
PROFIT SHARE
# **Audition notice: Underneath the Lintel**

Show dates: 20-24 October 2026

Show venue: Nottingham Arts Theatre (studio)

Audition date: 11 July 2026, 1-4 pm (you will not need to be present for the full time and will be assigned a timeslot).

Audition venue: Lace Market Theatre, Nottingham

Karuna Productions invites auditionees for *Underneath the Lintel,* a one-woman show about obsession, loneliness and the search for belonging. When a middle-aged librarian uncovers evidence that a mythical figure dating back to mediaeval times may actually exist, she embarks on an improbable, absurd quest. It will take her across the world and face to face with life’s biggest questions – and finally to a small theatre in Nottingham to share her story…
# Parts

**The Librarian **(F, 40s-50s). Dutch (accent negotiable. Support will be available as needed on pronunciation of a few Dutch words – the director is a Dutch speaker). Eccentric, single-minded, a loner, somewhat scatty. She may initially appear ordinary, even forgettable, but a great deal lurks beneath. Requires a skilled actor with excellent comic instincts, who can command an audience’s attention while convincing as someone with limited social skills and an acute interest in minutiae.

# **About the production**

The run time of the show is about 1 hour. Rehearsals will take place in Nottingham, scheduled according to the availability of actor and director. This is a profit-share production.

# **About the company**

Karuna Productions is a new theatre company based in Nottingham.

**Director: **Chris Sims. Chris is a Nottingham-based director and graduate of the Bristol Old Vic Theatre School. Examples of his work can be found at [www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk](https://www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk/).

**Producer:** Laurie Owen. Laurie is a Nottingham-based independent producer who works across theatre and comedy.

For more information or to register for an audition slot, please email Chris on [kitsims@gmail.com](mailto:kitsims@gmail.com)

items.summary:
PROFIT SHARE
# **Audition notice: Underneath the Lintel**

Show dates: 20-24 October 2026

Show venue: Nottingham Arts Theatre (studio)

Audition date: 11 July 2026, 1-4 pm (you will not need to be present for the full time and will be assigned a timeslot).

Audition venue: Lace Market Theatre, Nottingham

Karuna Productions invites auditionees for *Underneath the Lintel,* a one-woman show about obsession, loneliness and the search for belonging. When a middle-aged librarian uncovers evidence that a mythical figure dating back to mediaeval times may actually exist, she embarks on an improbable, absurd quest. It will take her across the world and face to face with life’s biggest questions – and finally to a small theatre in Nottingham to share her story…
# Parts

**The Librarian **(F, 40s-50s). Dutch (accent negotiable. Support will be available as needed on pronunciation of a few Dutch words – the director is a Dutch speaker). Eccentric, single-minded, a loner, somewhat scatty. She may initially appear ordinary, even forgettable, but a great deal lurks beneath. Requires a skilled actor with excellent comic instincts, who can command an audience’s attention while convincing as someone with limited social skills and an acute interest in minutiae.

# **About the production**

The run time of the show is about 1 hour. Rehearsals will take place in Nottingham, scheduled according to the availability of actor and director. This is a profit-share production.

# **About the company**

Karuna Productions is a new theatre company based in Nottingham.

**Director: **Chris Sims. Chris is a Nottingham-based director and graduate of the Bristol Old Vic Theatre School. Examples of his work can be found at [www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk](https://www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk/).

**Producer:** Laurie Owen. Laurie is a Nottingham-based independent producer who works across theatre and comedy.

For more information or to register for an audition slot, please email Chris on [kitsims@gmail.com](mailto:kitsims@gmail.com)

Tales From The Hollywood Voice Over Vault features unforgettable stories, rare behind-the-scenes moments, celebrity encounters, studio adventures, and lessons learned from decades in the entertainment industry. New episodes drop every week, taking you inside the world of voice over like never before! #voiceover #Hollywood #BehindTheScenesa ##HollywoodStories #voiceactor #marcgraue #legendary #voiceovercoach #studiostories #voice

items.text:
🎟 Looking for one of the best things to do in Spokane on Saturday, June 13th? 🎟 Use this special code **DDSWA** 

www.thedinnerdetective.com/spokane

The Dinner Detective combines dinner, comedy, mystery, and audience participation into one unforgettable evening. The actors are hidden throughout the crowd, making every guest part of the experience.

Perfect for couples, friend groups, celebrations, and team outings.

Reserve your seats and see if you can solve the mystery.

🎟 Looking for one of the best things to do in Spokane on Saturday, June 13th? 🎟 Use this special code **DDSWA** 

www.thedinnerdetective.com/spokane

The Dinner Detective combines dinner, comedy, mystery, and audience participation into one unforgettable evening. The actors are hidden throughout the crowd, making every guest part of the experience.

Perfect for couples, friend groups, celebrations, and team outings.

Reserve your seats and see if you can solve the mystery.
items.title: 🎟 Looking for one of the best things to do in Spokane on Saturday, June 13th? 🎟 Use this special code **DDSWA**

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — PAID — Older Male Actor for Short Film — Katy/Houston**

Hi everyone, I’m casting an older male actor for a paid short proof-of-concept film shooting in the Katy/Houston area.

We’re especially looking for someone with a grandfatherly presence, strong emotional range, and ideally some theatre experience.

**Project**: Short proof-of-concept film

**Shoot Date**: Friday, June 19 (night shoot)

**Location**: Katy / Houston area

**Compensation**: Paid

**Genre/Tone**: Dramatic, character-driven

The film centers on a charged meeting between a young man and an eccentric older poet inside a dark, atmospheric study.

**CASTING: EDMUND**

Looking for an older male actor, playing age roughly **60–80**.

Edmund is a warm, eccentric, theatrical older poet — grandfatherly, charming, funny. He can be childlike and playful in one moment, then suddenly shift into accusation, wounded anger, and passionate intensity.

This is a very performance-driven role with a lot of emotional shifts — from humor and playfulness to volatility and anger, and finally vulnerability. The role can be theatrical, but it should still feel human and truthful, not exaggerated or cartoonish.

This is a dialogue-heavy role and would be ideal for an actor with theatre experience, strong presence, and emotional depth.

**British accent required.**

Theatrical/classical background is a plus.

More information on the role and project: [https://www.junipervalleyfilm.com/edmund-ashford](https://www.junipervalleyfilm.com/edmund-ashford)

**TO APPLY**

Email preferred: [your email]

Subject line: EDMUND— [Your Name]

Please include:

Name

Role/position you’re applying for

Location

Relevant experience

Actor headshot/reel/resume, or crew reel/website/credits

Availability on June 19

DMs are also okay, and referrals are very welcome — especially for older actors with theatre experience.

Project website for more context: junipervalleyfilm.com

Thank you!
items.previewDescription: A role of theatrical force and hidden grief. Playful, volatile, tender, and wounded, Malcolm is a man whose theatricality hides a genuine ache. “The Temple of Peace” Malcolm’s study is the outward expression of his inner life. It is within this room that the film’s central confrontation unfo...

items.text:
🚗 AUSTIN, TX CASTING CALL 🚗
Are you local to the Austin area? Do you have a valid drivers license and a car? Put those to good use and submit to our casting!!

*CASTING REAL PEOPLE* (non-union) for a commercial that will film in the Austin area. We are interviewing real people on their opinions, as well as filming them driving their cars. Must be comfortable driving on camera in both highway and residential areas.

DEMO: All ages (18+), genders, and ethnicities are encouraged to apply.

PAYMENT: $500, for a half day of cruising - 4-5 hours total. *Must be able to fill out payroll/I-9 paperwork*

Film Usage: Online, Digital, and New Media

Territory: Domestic and Global

Usage Term: In-Perpetuity

LINK TO SUBMIT:

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – FEMALE SUPPORTING LEAD ROLE (NON-UNION, PAID) 🎬

Independent comedy short film is seeking a Latina actress or an actress who can portray a Latin woman for the role of Sofia filming in Miami, FL.

ROLE: SOFIA
Female, 40s or older preferred. Confident, lively, flirtatious, and larger than life. Sofia has a strong screen presence with expressive reactions and natural comedic instincts. The role contains minor dialogue but strong comedic visual scenes and physical comedy throughout.

Must be comfortable wearing high heels and appearing significantly taller than the male lead (5’5”). Preferred if actress is 5’7” or taller.

⸻

Production Details:
📍 Location: Miami, Florida
📅 Shoot Date: June, Exact date TBD
💰 Compensation: Paid

⸻

Requirements:
• NON-UNION ONLY (Must not be SAG-AFTRA)
• Strong comedic timing, facial expressions, and physical comedy skills
• Confident, charismatic on-camera presence
• Salsa or basic dance ability is a plus 
• Must be local or able to self-report
• Reel and/or video sample REQUIRED

⸻

Submission Instructions:
Please send headshot, reel and/or video sample, and current location to:
📩 elaine@elainefilms.com

Subject Line: Sofia Submission

Serious and available talent only.

items.text:
☠️ Listen up, ya landlubbers...

We're buildin' a cast. We're buildin' a crew. And we're buildin' a movie.

If you've ever wanted to act, run camera, make content, tell stories, or just be part of somethin' bigger than yourself...

Now's the time to climb aboard.

🎬 Tomorrow • 6:30 PM
📍 Colorado Media School

4380 S Syracuse St Suite 400, Denver, CO 80237

No fancy Hollywood nonsense.

Just good people makin' movies.

🌐 https://movieteam.site/

The tide waits for no pirate.

items.title: ☠️ Listen up, ya landlubbers...

items.text:
BUILDING STAY LIVE

Design the Film • Play Along • Win Prizes

Ever wondered what it takes to turn a novel into a film?

Join us for a fun, interactive evening as we pull back the curtain on the STAY proof of concept and invite you into the filmmaking process.

Throughout the event, you'll help us make creative decisions, play along in live games, compete for prizes, and get an inside look at how we're bringing STAY from page to screen.

During the event we'll:

 Explore characters, locations, and visual ideas from the STAY universe

 Help design the world of STAY through live audience polls and discussions

 Learn what goes into creating a proof of concept and why we're making one

 Play "Guess the Budget" and see if you can correctly estimate real filmmaking costs

 Compete in fun character-based games and cast challenges

 Win STAY-themed prizes and exclusive digital goodies

 Learn how your support helps bring this story to life

Whether you've read the books, attended previous events, or are discovering STAY for the very first time, this event is designed to be interactive, entertaining, and welcoming to everyone.

Come play along, meet the team, and help us build the future of STAY.

 Date & Time:

June 8, 2026 @ 3pm PST, 4pm MST, 5pm CST, 6pm EST

 Platform:

Riverside

[https://riverside.com/studio/landons-studio-ikGYl](https://riverside.com/studio/landons-studio-ikGYl?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExS0d0OE5nZnF5TWVnbmhtQ3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR44MxgWb1RLT3_qROaFO1BN_IdZFHqvF_4MH7cEmbEPLXvGoNQdRb5wzT8BFA_aem_vzQT1Q-jEiMSrBOcmfWERw)...

 Prizes Available Throughout the Event

 Supporting the STAY Proof of Concept

items.title: BUILDING STAY LIVE

items.text:
**We are still seeking actors ages 18 and up! Auditions are due Tuesday!**

**Project: **Cryptophasia

**Type: **Theatre

***Audition Information***

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th.

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5Irm-Jb1muA3Zx8JLaYkrg3vzH2RacBbXQhxl-t0_UEG-PDA-bZB4jx-YGBQ_aem_OvBCwmeD9pLYDsr2RKqTmg)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fforms.gle%2Fj4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5EuBRnCPWdwQ2herTFHH3ZSgRCNVerpoqS20Atm7kv1_cIR4G8eqV1Msn22Q_aem_BOhUsw5S9vorqF6DZ5sWjA&h=AUDZr-FaMO1Cy-qmuCVf8Z3eOmd_L0d7nWR_38zi_0571mVfip6dGhM0CqSDaVBFN8ITlvVj50M1nrqfieWmQZF2TG0ka9xvQqbhU6aTfJkwsmrQbVNR_6RbimctXlTHFBcN&__tn__=-UK*F)

***Dates***

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed *****HERE*****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

***Compensation***

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit.

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre.*

***Show Synopsis***

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

***Character Breakdown***

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

***Production Team***

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

***About Us***

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects.

For questions or to learn more, visit [www.stagebugztheatre.com](https://www.facebook.com/api/graphql/www.stagebugztheatre.com?__tn__=-UK*F) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.

items.summary:
**We are still seeking actors ages 18 and up! Auditions are due Tuesday!**

**Project: **Cryptophasia

**Type: **Theatre

***Audition Information***

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th.

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5Irm-Jb1muA3Zx8JLaYkrg3vzH2RacBbXQhxl-t0_UEG-PDA-bZB4jx-YGBQ_aem_OvBCwmeD9pLYDsr2RKqTmg)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fforms.gle%2Fj4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5EuBRnCPWdwQ2herTFHH3ZSgRCNVerpoqS20Atm7kv1_cIR4G8eqV1Msn22Q_aem_BOhUsw5S9vorqF6DZ5sWjA&h=AUDZr-FaMO1Cy-qmuCVf8Z3eOmd_L0d7nWR_38zi_0571mVfip6dGhM0CqSDaVBFN8ITlvVj50M1nrqfieWmQZF2TG0ka9xvQqbhU6aTfJkwsmrQbVNR_6RbimctXlTHFBcN&__tn__=-UK*F)

***Dates***

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed *****HERE*****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

***Compensation***

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit.

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre.*

***Show Synopsis***

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

***Character Breakdown***

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

***Production Team***

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

***About Us***

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects.

For questions or to learn more, visit [www.stagebugztheatre.com](https://www.facebook.com/api/graphql/www.stagebugztheatre.com?__tn__=-UK*F) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.

items.text:
Stwórzmy razem film krótkometrażowy na Festiwal Filmowy ❤️

Gatunek: Dramat psychologiczny 

Chce stworzyć pełnoprawny, dopracowany film krótkometrażowy, scenariusz: ma 20 stron

CEL: Festiwal Filmowy - w czerwcu chce zebrać ekipę, w lipcu zacząć zdjęcia - lokalizacja Trójmiasto 

STATUS: Szukam ekipy i obsady!

FORMA WSPÓŁPRACY: TFP (budujemy wspólne, mocne portfolio na festiwal)

Szukam ekipy z TRÓJMIASTA „do zadań specjalnych”, która pomoże mi zrealizować bardzo osobisty i odważny projekt filmowy pokazujący cierpienie psychiczne i fizyczne, walkę ze swoimi demonami. Scenariusz jest gotowy, oparty na faktach. To kino autorskie, surowe i pełne emocji. Chcę stworzyć pełnoprawne, dopracowane dzieło.

KOGO SZUKAM? (EKIPA TECHNICZNA)

Pomocnik operatora kamery: Osoba do wsparcia przy kamerze i sprzęcie (zmiana obiektywów, pomoc przy ustawieniach, praca na planie przy kamerze).

Kierownik produkcji: Osoba, która pomoże ogarnąć organizację planu: logistyka, harmonogramy, kontakt z ekipą i pilnowanie porządku produkcyjnego, może budżet?

Współreżyser: Szukam osoby do współtworzenia wizji filmu, pracy nad scenami, pomysłami i realizacją

Oświetlacz (Gaffer): Osoba, która pomoże zbudować klimat światłem i wesprze pracę DOP-a przy ustawieniu oświetlenia.

Montażysta: Szukam osoby, która potrafi opowiadać obrazem, czuje rytm i emocje. Kogoś, kto sprawnie poukłada sceny i stworzy spójną historię.

SPRZĘT: Nie oczekuję własnego sprzętu – możemy go wypożyczyć i wspólnie podzielić się kosztami wynajmu dla jak najlepszego efektu.

✅ OBSADA (szukam tylko osób pełnoletnich, wyglądających na wiek poniżej):

EMILIA (rola główna, postać 16 l.): Delikatna uroda, długie brązowe włosy. Rola wymagająca pokazania wewnętrznego rozdarcia i ataków paniki. (Wymagana scena w bieliźnie oraz scena pocałunku).

MAKS (postać 16 l.): Brązowe, nieco dłuższe falowane włosy. Typ „chłopaka z okładki”, wysportowany, o bardzo wrażliwym spojrzeniu. (Wymagana scena pocałunku).

AURORA (postać 16-20 l.): Postać nadrealna. Bardzo jasne włosy (blond/biel), białe rzęsy i brwi mogą być pomalowane tuszem. Uroda niemal „anielska”.

KASIA (postać 16 l.): Drobna, niska, z brązowymi lokami i piegami. Pełna energii i uśmiechu. (Wymagana scena w bieliźnie).

MAGDA (ok. 45 l.): Mama Emilii. Ciemne włosy, ciepłe, ale nieco zmęczone spojrzenie.

DAWID (postać 20 l.): Brat Emilii. Chudy, kręcone ciemne włosy.

ROLE DRUGOPLANOWE (1-2 sceny):
PANI MALWINA (ok. 50 l.): Nauczycielka WF, srogi wyraz twarzy.
MĘŻCZYZNA (ok. 50 l.): Barczysty, duży.
DZIEWCZYNY (1, 2, 3, 4): Ćwiczą na WF-ie. Bez konkretnych wymagań wizualnych – chcę poczuć flow! + scena w sali lekcyjnej
CHŁOPCY (1, 2, 3, 4): Ćwiczą na WF-ie. Bez konkretnych wymagań wizualnych – chcę poczuć flow! + scena w sali lekcyjnej 

Potrzebuję również STATYSTÓW do scen z większą grupą ludzi.

WAŻNE: Film zawiera sceny wymagające dużej dojrzałości emocjonalnej.

PLAN: Przed wybraniem aktorów chciałabym z każdym porozmawiać na Zoomie i szerzej przedstawić projekt. Następnie planuję wspólne czytanie scenariusza w kawiarni i startujemy z pracą!

Jeśli jesteś gotowy/a – odezwij się na priv z portfolio/demo!

Moje zdjęcie dla uwagi

items.text:
GRAVE STAKES — OPEN CASTING CALL

Hey everyone! My name is Paul Dächert, I’m a Bachelor directing student at SAE Institute Munich, and I’m currently casting for my thesis film — and I’d love for you to be part of it.

THE FILM

Grave Stakes is a stylized Western dramedy set in a surreal frontier world where death is not an end, but a negotiation. A dying man embarks on a final journey back to his hometown with one goal: to take control over how his life ends. Along the way, a reluctant Death-in-training, a cynical grave digger, and a sharp-witted outlaw woman join him on a road that blends dark humor with existential depth.

Can we truly control how our story ends — or is that the one thing we must learn to let go?

📍 Munich, Germany · 🎬 Sep 10–13, 2026 · 🗣 Filmed in English
💰 No budget · Full catering on set · Showreel footage · Festival submission

THE ROLES

We are currently casting the following five roles:

🤠 Will O’Die — Lead
Male · 30–50 · Black / Afro-descendant
A man at the edge of his life. Dry-witted, quietly stubborn, and carrying both dark humor and real emotional weight. His journey isn’t about survival — it’s about authorship.

🌵 Gloria Sorrow — Lead
Woman · 22–32 · All backgrounds welcome
The sharpest person in every room. Self-possessed, funny, with real warmth underneath the armor. The film never comments on her being a woman. By the end, she’s Sheriff.

💀 Ashford Reaper — Supporting Lead
Open · 25–45 · All backgrounds welcome · ⚠️ British accent essential
Death. In training. Charming, earnest, and reliably incompetent in the most endearing way. The most human character in the film — and the funniest.

🃏 Quinn Alistor — Supporting
Open · 35–55 · All backgrounds welcome
A loveable rogue who would pickpocket Death himself. Runs on charm and self-interest — mostly. Somewhere underneath is one genuine act of kindness that matters more than he’d ever admit.

✝️ The Priest — Supporting
Open · 40–65 · All backgrounds welcome
Rides in unannounced, finds a practice funeral in progress, and steps up to officiate without missing a beat. One scene. One speech. The whole film hinges on it.

HOW TO APPLY

📅 Deadline: July 10, 2026
📩 dachertpaul@gmail.com

Please send:
→ A ~1 minute video in English: your name, age, location, and why a specific role speaks to you
→ A headshot
→ CV & showreel welcome, but not required

Fluent English required. Native speaker preferred — but what matters most is that you feel at home in the language.

We are committed to inclusive casting and warmly encourage actors from all backgrounds to apply. All experience levels welcome. Presence and truth over credits. ❤️

#GraveStakes #CastingCall #ShortFilm #StudentFilm #SAEMunich #OpenCall #CastingGermany #ActorsOfInstagram #WesternFilm #FilmMunich

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Drehtage 08.06.26 und 09.06.26, gedreht wird nähe Grafenau im Bayerischen Wald. Wir brauchen noch Darsteller/innen, Komparsen, die Bewohner eines Bauerndorfes und schwarze Ritter spielen, die dieses Dorf überfallen und belagern. Ebenfalls werden noch zwei schwarze Ritter gesucht, mit Text (mit Dialog). Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße (für die Rollen mit Dialog ist ein Vorstellungsvideo erforderlich) bitte an Harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger an Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text: Day 2 in New York. Such a blessing...so I gave God some of my time!

items.summary: Day 2 in New York. Such a blessing...so I gave God some of my time!
items.title: Day 2 in New York. Such a blessing...so I gave God some of my time!

items.text:
Hope Among The Cosmos Student Film Deadline Extension (June 10th, Wed)
CASTING CALL — Hope Among The Cosmos Short Film | Rockford, IL Area | Shooting September 2026 (19th, 20th, 26th, 27th), with a possible pick-up shot date in early October (TBA).

Hope Among The Cosmos is a post-apocalyptic sci-fi story about a father and daughter on a routine trading run that goes very wrong. It's got action, heart, and some genuinely dark moments. Think practical effects, real locations, and a story worth telling.

This is a student/indie production, unpaid, but you'll get credit, meals on shoot days, and footage of your work when it's ready.

XANDER — Male, 30s-40s
The father. Big presence, quiet intensity, he carries a lot of weight but doesn't talk about. Physical role, but the emotional stuff is what really matters. If you can be still and terrifying at the same time. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

MINA — Female, 12-15
Xander's daughter and the soul of this film. She's not a sidekick. She's watching her dad's world for the first time and figuring out what she believes. I need someone who can actually listen on camera, not just act. Same ethnicity preference as Xander, African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

YOUNG XANDER — Male, 8-11
A flashback version of Xander as a kid, alone in a ruined outpost, finding something he shouldn't. Barely any dialogue, this is all about what's on his face. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial. 

Email jordanm.hannah89@gmail.com

Subject: Hope Among the Cosmos Casting, [Your Name]
Send a photo, the role you're going for, your September availability, and a little about yourself. and request the sides, and they will be sent immediately.

I need someone who can actually listen on camera, not just act. Same ethnicity preference as Xander, African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

YOUNG XANDER — Male, 8-11
A flashback version of Xander as a kid, alone in a ruined outpost, finding something he shouldn't. Barely any dialogue, this is all about what's on his face. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial. 

Email jordanm.hannah89@gmail.com

Subject: Hope Among the Cosmos Casting, [Your Name]
Send a photo, the role you're going for, your September availability, and a little about yourself. and request the sides, and they will be sent immediately.
items.title: Hope Among The Cosmos Student Film Deadline Extension (June 10th, Wed)

items.text:
It took 40 years, but I made it! I am in New York, New York! Yes, I slayed my audition on Saturday,  June 6, 2026 for Acting and Modeling with two bars of singing in my monologue with W Talent! Now I am just chilling and enjoying the city! 

Backstory I was invited to an  audition at 19 and my Dad said "No!" I respected that. Rest in peace, Dad. Forty years later, I was invited to an audition, I said "Yes!" So happy to finally make it to this big city! Thank you, God for giving me a second chance.  Love y'all. 

(Side note for Dermotologists and Cosmetologists, if you recognize the skin rash on my face - please help. I have noticed other women my age with it too. Hopefully it is not age related. Anyway help if you know what it is. My doctors are baffled, even after a biopsy. God bless.)

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL: “DR AMINA [SERIES]”  
Produced by Keba entertainment together with Ushkzan streaming App 
We are looking for passionate, dedicated actors to bring this project to life
  About the series
This is a story about life pressure, the cruelty of life , ambition , greed and crime and a young mother’s response to it.
  Production Details
• Location: Johannesburg, South Africa
• Schedule: AUG –SEP  (Weekends ONLY)
• Professional status: no-name , no agency young actors
• Compensation: Negotiable [daily or  series based rate –based on role] ; cast will receive IMDb credit, on-set snacks, and a collaborative, creatively fulfilling experience with a professional  team
  Audition Instructions
Please submit a self-taped audition[using your phone] . You may have someone reading the other role. Begin the video with your name and anything you want us to know about you.
Email: kebaentertainment@kebaaiworld.com
Subject Line: ACTOR: DR AMINA SERIES
  Character Breakdown
PLEASE SEE ATTACHED POSTER
•   Why Be Part of  DR AMINA [series]?
This is more than just a Series — it’s an opportunity to collaborate on a the reality haunting, South Africans  today; So whether you’re a student , no-name cast building your reel, gaining on-set experience, or looking to be part of something meaningful and atmospheric, DR AMINA [series] offers a unique and professional experience.
  We’re excited to see what you can offer.
Submit your audition and join us.

*Casting Call!*

We need skilled and talented actors and actresses who are fluent English speakers for these roles:

- *Coach Pascal* (55, male) – University sports coach  
- *Grandmother / Mama Grace* (60s–70s)  
- *Uncle John* (30s)  
- *Tinache’s Mother* (40s) – a real “aunty” type  
- *Minister* (40s) – wedding planner  

Send your profile to Mr. Eddie on 0622634638 to receive an audition script.

*Note:* Submissions close Friday, 5 June. Auditions must be sent by Thursday, 4 June.

Thank you!

items.text:
**PILNY CASTING!!! - ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

Bardzo pilnie, do zamkniętego serialu kryminalnego dla jednej z platform, poszukuję **CHŁOPCA w** **wieku 6-10 lat.**

Zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie. 

Rozpoczynają się w połowie lipca i potrwają do października 2026. 

Rola chłopca to ok. 10 dni zdjęciowych.

**Chłopiec to zapalony kibic, pełen energii łobuziak,  wysportowany i lubiący grać w piłkę nożną. **

**W zgłoszeniu bardzo proszę o przesłanie poniższych krótkich materiałów filmowych: **

1. Krótkiej wizytówki dziecka - imię nazwisko, wiek i krótką wypowiedź o swoich zainteresowaniach np. sport, gry itp.

2. Krótkie, spontaniczne nagranie kibicowskich przyśpiewek lub dopingu ulubionej drużyny piłkarskiej piłkarskiej.

Zgłoszenie proszę wysyłać poprzez formularz:

https://form.jotform.com/261513807079056

**ZGŁOSZENIA PROSIMY PRZESYŁAĆ D0 7 CZERWCA.**

**EWENTUALNE ZDJĘCIA PRÓBNE ODBĘDĄ SIĘ 13-14 CZERWCA W WARSZAWIE.**

## 🎥**WARSZAWA — ZOSTAŃ CZĘŚCIĄ WIDOWNI KULTOWEGO TELETURNIEJU!**🎥
** **

Zapraszamy osoby polskojęzyczne w wieku 17–60 lat do udziału w nagraniach programu jako publiczność!

To świetna okazja, by zobaczyć telewizję od kulis, poczuć atmosferę prawdziwego planu zdjęciowego i przeżyć wyjątkową przygodę🎬

📩Terminy nagrań w czerwcu:

sharedPost.text:
Ich bin glücklich!

Glücklich über jeden Tag an dem es mir soweit gut geht, glücklich das meine Leidenschaft mein Beruf sein kann, glücklich das ich sein darf was ich bin - ein Mensch! 

Und wenn ich das Mikrofon in die Hand nehme, auf Play drücke und meine Energie, meine Interpretation von Kunst an die Menschen weitergebe die es wertschätzen, dann ist diese kleine Welt in Ordnung.

Ich habe mal die Kamera mitlaufen lassen und euch ein kleines Medley zusammengestellt. 🎶

Worin findet ihr euer tägliches Glück?

Schreibt es in die Kommentare ☀️
.
.
.
#probe #mathiasmariekaiser #glück #livegesang #medley

items.text:
Kære medlem, Vi har filtreret inaktive medlemmer, og vi vil gøre det igen, så hvis du ser dette opslag, så sig noget for at blive i gruppen. Tak.
Cremeret agurke- og rejesalat
Ingredienser:
Til salaten:
450 g kogte rejer, pillede og rensede
2 store agurker, tyndt skåret
2,5 dl cherrytomater, halverede
Jeg elsker denne hurtige og nemme opskrift. Sig venligst noget verbalt for at blive ved med at modtage mine opskrifter.. Tak..

items.text:
**Our LIVE Actor Q&A.**

**No script. No presentation. Just real questions from actors and honest answers from us, KC and Donna-Marie.**

In this class we answer questions about:

🎬 Why talented actors aren't always booking
🎬 The difference between talent and skill
🎬 What casting directors are really looking for
🎬 How to know if you're making the right choices
🎬 What may be holding your career back right now

If you've ever wondered:

"Am I good enough?"

"Why am I auditioning but not booking?"

"What should I be working on next?"

There's a good chance we've answered it here.

And if you're watching the replay...

**Leave your question in the YouTube comments.**

**We read them, and we'll answer them.**

Watch the replay and ask away. 👇

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – COMEDY SHORT FILM (NON-UNION, PAID) 🎬

Our team of industry professionals is coming together to create a fun, high-quality comedy short film, giving actors and performers the opportunity to gain experience and work on set with an experienced creative team.

We are currently seeking extras for multiple scenes filming in Miami and Hollywood, FL.

ROLES NEEDED:

• BEACH CHAIR MAN – Male, any ethnicity, age 30–60. Will appear in comedic beach sequence lying in beach chair next to lead actor.

• BEACH WOMEN – Two women, age range 20s–40s, attractive beachgoer types for comedic visual scene at the beach.

• LATIN RESTAURANT EXTRAS – Men and women, all ethnicities, age range 20s–60s. Patrons, dancers, and background characters for lively Miami Latin restaurant/bar scene.

⸻

Production Details:
📍 Locations: Miami, FL & Hollywood Beach, FL
📅 Shoot Dates: June, Exact dates TBD
💰 Compensation: Paid

⸻

Requirements:
• NON-UNION ONLY
• Must be local or able to self-report
• Comfortable working in lively comedy environment
• Some extras may be featured prominently on camera

⸻

Submission Instructions:
Please send headshot/photo, age, current location, and contact information to:
📩 elaine@elainefilms.com

Subject Line: Extras Submission

Serious and available talent only.

Here's a polished casting call post:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – AUE PRODUCTION COMPANY** 🎬

AUE Production Company is now casting for an exciting new television series produced and directed by **Jana Sullivan**.

Jana Sullivan is the writer and producer of *Another Man's Treasure*, which debuted on Tubi, and the author of several successful book series, including numerous ghostwritten works.

We are currently seeking talented actors for a brand-new gritty television series that is set to debut on Tubi. This powerful and groundbreaking series is ready to change the game! We are located in Cincinnati Ohio

Interested actors should submit:

✅ A short bio

✅ A short monologue

Send submissions to: **[actupentemail@gmail.com](mailto:actupentemail@gmail.com)**

Or inbox us directly on Messenger.

Serious inquiries only. We are looking for dedicated talent ready to bring unforgettable characters to life.

#CastingCall #ActorsWanted #TVSeries #Tubi #AUEProductionCompany #JanaSullivan #Auditions #ActingOpportunity

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL & CREW CALL

Hi everyone,
I’m am the co director/ co producer of the upcoming student proof of concept, ‘Canary’.
We are looking for cast and crew for this film. We plan to shoot this film on August 10-August 14 in Sydney, Australia . It would be mostly unpaid, but catering services will be provided along with credit and final cuts of the film. We are open to paying compensation for sound, but cannot adhere to daily rates as this is a student production. If you want to be a part of a female led story and production, nows your time to make this happen!

If interested, please email me 
mp4.allish@gmail.com

SUBMISSIONS CLOSE FRIDAY 5TH JUNE, 2026

**CASTING CALL! **We are looking for leading cast roles in commutable distance to Portsmouth for our annual pantomime - this year is Pinocchio! Produced in-house and performed alongside a cast of local child actors, this year's production aims to be the most fun and accessible panto in Portsmouth! 

 

**Details of roles, dates and auditions: **[https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting](https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting)

 

We're a community led theatre and as such cast members will be expected to work alongside young people, children and our volunteers - and look to have fun in the process!

 

For consideration, please submit a self tape including requested audition scenes and songs on the link above, indicating the specific role you’re applying for by 18 June 2026 to casting@groundlings.co.uk

See link in our post to find out more! Groundlings ndlingsTheatre,Portsmouth Theatre, Groundlings THIATH'

items.text:
Where Will Your Acting Career Be a Year From Now If You Keep Doing What You’re Doing?
You trained. You got the headshots. Maybe you even got the agent.

And yet you’re wondering how you’re supposed to become a working actor when things aren’t progressing?

I am Freya Tingley. I was 14 when I started. No connections, no Hollywood map. By 17 I had signed with one of the biggest agents in town. At 18 I moved to LA and three months later I was a series regular on a Netflix show. Then Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood. Then Wendy Darling on ABC’s Once Upon a Time.

It looks like luck from the outside. It wasn’t.

What you are not being told is that the actors who book have figured out the strategy. The ones who do not are still hoping for their lucky break.

I have been getting a lot of messages from actors lately saying:
“I have an agent but no auditions.”
“I am auditioning but not booking.”
“I do not know what I am doing wrong.”

All you need is the strategy. 

I run private 2-hour 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. We diagnose where you’re stuck, build a custom plan, and you leave knowing exactly what to do next - with the exact strategy to move you forward. 

If you know something needs to change, direct message me “COMMIT” to apply for a session. I have just a handful 

What would it cost you to change nothing?

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people

🚨 CASTING CALL – LOS ANGELES / SANTA MONICA AREA 🚨
We’re currently casting for an upcoming Latin music video and are looking for:

✨ 15 DANCERS
✨ 10 BACKGROUND EXTRAS

📍 Location: Los Angeles / Santa Monica Area
💰 PAID OPPORTUNITY 

(Dancers anywhere from $150-250) 
(Background/ Extras any from $80-120) 

⏰ Approx. 6-hour shoot day
🎥 Professional music video production
📅 Shoot date will be provided to selected talent

DANCERS

* Must be comfortable performing on camera
* Latin dance experience is a plus but not required
* All genders and ethnicities welcome

BACKGROUND EXTRAS

* No acting experience necessary
* Must be comfortable on camera
* All genders, ethnicities, and body types encouraged to apply

To be considered, please send:
📸 Recent photos/headshots
📱 Instagram handle
📍 Current location
📞 Contact information
💃 (Dancers only) Dance reel or video if available

DM me for details or email: [YOUR EMAIL]

Production by @mirrahcreative
For verification: @ddaanielasm

items.text:
Hi everyone! My name is Chloe, and I’m actively looking for opportunities to work as a Film Production Assistant in film, television, commercials, or other media productions.

I’m a 2024 high school graduate with a strong passion for storytelling, filmmaking, and television production. I have experience with video editing, creative writing, screenwriting, theater arts, and working in fast-paced team environments. I’m reliable, hardworking, organized, and eager to learn from industry professionals.

✅ Valid driver’s license
✅ Willing to relocate anywhere for the right opportunity
✅ Flexible schedule
✅ Strong work ethic and positive attitude
✅ Passionate about film and television production

I’m looking to connect with filmmakers, production companies, crew members, and anyone who may know of PA openings, internships, or entry-level opportunities.

If you have any advice, leads, or opportunities, please feel free to comment or send me a message. Thank you for your time and support!

I DO LIVE IN PENNSYLVANIA BUT I AM WILLING TO MOVE!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! 

#FilmProductionAssistant #ProductionAssistant #FilmJobs #TVProduction #Filmmaking #FilmIndustry #ProductionCrew #EntryLevelFilmJobs #OpenToWork #FilmNetworking #AspiringFilmmaker 🎥✨

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL - EDINBURGH ‼️‼️
Hello, we are currently looking for a male actor for our student short film with Edinburgh College. We are aiming for film from the 6-9th of May and so are looking for someone who will be available within those days. 

Age - 25-26 ( Casting age - 25-27 or just an older looking 23 and above year olds.)
Identity - Straight, white, man, Scottish.
Personality - Narcissist, passionate, hot headed,
"nice" guy, controlling, and abusive.
Character Synopsis - Dany is dating a girl who discovers that her blood glows. He then discovers that he is obsessed with looking at the blood, and continues to ask his girlfriend (Bevan) to give him more of her blood. Disappointed when she can no longer produce what he wants, he leaves her.

Story Synopsis: A young girl discovers that her blood glows while harming herself. Panicked and disturbed by this discovery, she shows her boyfriend. Who, instead of having care or concern for her, starts exploiting her for her blood as he is enticed by it.
Struggling to perform and produce consistently for him, she grapples with self hate and worth, loosing grip on her mental state. Eventually, when her blood isn’t satisfactory for him anymore, he leaves her feeling worthless after sucking her dry of her youth and innocence.

If you are interested or want to know more please email our director at: ec1958677@edinburghcollege.ac.uk

items.text:
Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - [ROLE NAME] - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Keisha: Female, 30-45. Black or Hispanic/Latina.**

Headstrong, sharp-tongued, stylish, and not afraid to curse someone out when necessary. Keisha designs clothes, accessories, and trinkets that she sells to local mom-and-pop stores. Her long-term goal is to become a successful designer whose work is sold in major department store chains.

**Tone:** Bold, funny, confident, protective, blunt.

2.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous. Bisexual.**The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

 

3.      **Aaron**: **Male, 25-35. Any ethnicity.**

The department brown-noser. Aaron is always trying to impress management, climb the corporate ladder, and make himself look more important than he is. He has a long-running beef with Kenneth and enjoys trying to get under his skin.

**Tone:** Corporate suck-up, petty rival, passive-aggressive, self-important.

 

4.      **Derek**: **Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

The department manager. Derek is positive, supportive, and genuinely wants his team to succeed. He tries to keep the department moving forward while managing strong personalities, office politics, and workplace chaos.

**Tone:** Supportive manager, patient, professional, quietly funny.

 

5.      **Depression**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s depression. Depression is strangely upbeat and excited while delivering negative thoughts, self-doubt, and emotional pressure. This character should feel charming, unsettling, and emotionally dangerous without becoming cartoonish.

**Tone:** Cheerful menace, darkly funny, manipulative, emotionally sharp.

 

6.      **Anxiety**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s anxiety. Anxiety is panicky, restless, and constantly processing too many thoughts at once. They bounce between positive and negative possibilities while trying to calm both Kenneth and themselves down.

**Tone:** Erratic, nervous, fast-thinking, emotionally overwhelmed, sympathetic.

 

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks.  

Shooting Schedule: Planning for the 2nd-3rd weekend of July. 2 day 10 hour shoot.

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.

topComments.text: Where do we send this to?

items.text:
TITLE: LAST DEBT

GENRE:
Drama / Thriller

LOGLINE:
A dangerous confrontation between two women reveals betrayal, deception, and a deadly secret that neither can escape.

ROLE:
GABY

• Female
• Age 25–40
• Hard of Hearing preferred
• Fluent in American Sign Language (ASL)
• Must be able to communicate in both ASL and spoken English
• Distinctive appearance preferred
• Strong dramatic acting ability required

Character Description:
Gaby is a complex and emotionally layered woman who appears vulnerable and trustworthy but is deeply involved in a dangerous world of deception, manipulation, and survival. The role requires emotional depth, expressive facial acting, and the ability to perform intense dramatic scenes.

PRODUCTION COMPANY:
Quiet Mile Pictures

Writer:
Martina Bell

Director:
Nicki Runge

Producer:
Martina Bell and Nicki Runge

PRODUCTION TYPE:
Independent Short Film (Non-Union)

RUN TIME:
Short Film (Approximately 5–10 minutes)

COMPENSATION:
Paid

UNION STATUS:
Non-Union

AUDITION INFORMATION:
Initial submission requires:
• Headshot
• Resume
• Demo Reel (if available)

Selected actors will be contacted to submit a self-taped audition.

Submission Deadline:
June 20, 2026

SHOOTING SCHEDULE:
Principal Photography:
July 16–17, 2026

Two-day shoot schedule.

Rehearsal dates to be scheduled with selected cast.

FILMING LOCATION:
Denver, Colorado

CONTACT INFORMATION:
Email: [audition@qmpictures.com](mailto:audition@qmpictures.com)

PROJECT DESCRIPTION:
Quiet Mile Pictures is seeking an actress for the role of Gaby in the upcoming short film Last Debt. We welcome submissions from Deaf, Hard of Hearing, and hearing performers who meet the role requirements. This is a character-driven dramatic thriller with strong emotional performances and limited locations, making it an excellent opportunity for actors seeking substantial screen time in a lead supporting role.

Martina Bell

Director:
Nicki Runge

Producer:
Martina Bell and Nicki Runge

PRODUCTION TYPE:
Independent Short Film (Non-Union)

RUN TIME:
Short Film (Approximately 5–10 minutes)

COMPENSATION:
Paid

UNION STATUS:
Non-Union

AUDITION INFORMATION:
Initial submission requires:
• Headshot
• Resume
• Demo Reel (if available)

Selected actors will be contacted to submit a self-taped audition.

Submission Deadline:
June 20, 2026

SHOOTING SCHEDULE:
Principal Photography:
July 16–17, 2026

Two-day shoot schedule.

Rehearsal dates to be scheduled with selected cast.

FILMING LOCATION:
Denver, Colorado

CONTACT INFORMATION:
Email: [audition@qmpictures.com](mailto:audition@qmpictures.com)

PROJECT DESCRIPTION:
Quiet Mile Pictures is seeking an actress for the role of Gaby in the upcoming short film Last Debt. We welcome submissions from Deaf, Hard of Hearing, and hearing performers who meet the role requirements. This is a character-driven dramatic thriller with strong emotional performances and limited locations, making it an excellent opportunity for actors seeking substantial screen time in a lead supporting role.
items.title: TITLE: LAST DEBT

🎬✨ CASTING – GRAJĄCE DŁONIE ✨🎬
📍 Warszawa

Szukamy osób do reklamy, których dłonie zagrają główną rolę! ✋🎥

📅 Zdjęcia: 10.06, 11.06 i 12.06

⚠️ Wymagana dyspozycyjność we wszystkie trzy dni.

🏧 Zdjęcia w studio.

⏰ Godziny pracy nie są jeszcze znane, dlatego prosimy o dostępność przez cały dzień.

💰 Stawka: 500 zł brutto za dzień zdjęciowy

💳 Płatność przelewem.

🔎 Poszukujemy dłoni:

✔️ delikatnych, zadbanych

✔️ bez hybryd i stylizacji paznokci

✔️ z krótkimi paznokciami

✔️ neutralnych – takich, by trudno było określić, czy są męskie czy damskie

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać SMS-em na numer 797 169 069 z dopiskiem: „10.06, 11.06 i 12.06”

W wiadomości proszę podać:

• imię i nazwisko

• wiek

• zdjęcia twarzy

• zdjęcia dłoni

🎞️ Czekam na Wasze zgłoszenia!

Marta Filmakcja 😉🎬🙂✨

items.text:
CASTING CALL
A non-union Black sapphic narrative short film about loss, love, and the rich cultural spiritual traditions that process it all.

Shoots in Detroit, late summer 2026, tentative Spring 2027

LEAD — CANEISHA, mid-40s to 50s, Black masc-presenting/stud/androgynous. Grief-stricken, but warm and entertaining before losing the love of her life.

LEAD — LOVIE, late 40s to 50s, Black, dark-skinned or medium-brown, femme-presenting, free-spirited and goofy, with a classic case of eldest sister syndrome that still resides in her. 

SUPPORTING — AFENI, mid-40s to 50s, Black, medium-brown or dark-skinned, masc-presenting, tender best friend, kind of a hippie. 

SUPPORTING — AZRAELIA, mid-30s to mid-40s, dark-skinned Black woman, witty younger sister, ambitious and trendy businesswoman. Ideally full-figured.

SUPPORTING — PAPA MONTGOMERY - late 70s to 90s, Black, if y'all don't get y'all grandfather involved in a film. Playful and lively. 

COMPENSATION: This is a microbudget project. Currently we can guarantee profit shares from the film, but we are working on honorariums for each principal role. We're also working on funding to hopefully assist with travel or lodging for non-locals.

HOW TO APPLY:

Submit a good quality photo, resume, age, a reel if you have one and interest to freedomdrumfilm@gmail.com and casting director MacKenzie Galloway at mackenziegallowayllc@gmail.com. Sides will be sent upon receipt. Supplemental dramatic and comedic monologues are welcome. 

Stay involved with the project @freedomdrumfilm.

View the casting call on Instagram and Backstage: 

https://www.instagram.com/p/DX6qXEEDmME/?igsh=Z2g4aWNkMmF3dDE3

https://www.backstage.com/casting/freedom-drum-3147338/

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
**JOB:** Web Series — Recurring Host Role 

**CASTING:** Open gender, 25-45, strong on camera presence **LOCATION:** Long Beach, California, USA 

**COMPENSATION:** Paid — $1,000 per shoot day, rate open to discussion as series develops 

**CONTACT:** chloe@muhameds.com 

**TIME(S):** Accepting submissions now, production ongoing

Non-union. Seeking a host for a short form branded web series for a wellness and performance drink company shooting at a professional sound stage in Long Beach.

The character is knowledgeable, worldly, and genuinely curious — someone who's done the research and can't stop talking about what they found. Think less polished spokesperson, more fascinating person you met at a dinner party who happens to know everything about the history of medicinal mushrooms and isn't weird about it. Each episode covers a single functional ingredient — its origins, the science, why it matters. Scripts are provided but the right person will make them feel completely natural and uncontrived.

Background or genuine personal interest in health, wellness, nutrition, herbalism, biohacking, or related fields is a real advantage — the content will reward someone who actually finds this stuff interesting.

You are not: a supplement bro or a wellness influencer.

To apply send a short self tape video introducing yourself and why this sounds like your kind of thing. No formal reel required — just show us who you are.

sharedPost.text:
😲💫 Completely blown away by the spinning skills of the Shen Yun dancers — it’s unreal. Meanwhile, I’m over here getting dizzy just watching 😂😅
🎟️ Find your nearest theater and get tickets 👉 https://1kb.link/qJDkdm
⚡️ This isn’t something you can fully feel through a screen — you have to experience the magic, beauty, and energy live.
✨ Trust me, it’s the kind of night you won’t forget.

items.text:
Hello 
I am manager of pulsar show - Margo 

We are pleased to present our creative agency — Pulsar Theater.

https://www.instagram.com/pulsarshow?igsh=MWMxaTZzNThvbXoxeA==

Pulsar Theater specializes in professional light and fire shows, offering visually striking performances that enhance events of any scale and format.

Our capabilities include:
 • A wide range of show programs and performance formats
 • Original choreography tailored to your technical brief
 • An experienced in-house director and choreographer
 • Professional performers with stage experience
 • Exclusive costumes and high-quality props

We create unique шоу concepts adapted to your event, ensuring a memorable and engaging experience for your audience.

We would be glad to discuss your project and develop a customized performance that meets your goals.

Best regards,
Pulsar Theater Team

sharedPost.text:
POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: 
Seniorzy z charakterem (80+) 

Do wyjątkowej artystycznej sesji zdjęciowej  operatora nominowanego do Oscara poszukujemy osób w wieku 80 lat i więcej (rocznik 1930 - 1940)
Szukamy twarzy z historią – autentycznych, naturalnych i zbalansowanych życiowym doświadczeniem. Interesuje nas czyste, prawdziwe piękno dojrzałego wieku, dlatego szukamy osób, które wyglądają naturalnie na swój wiek.
Twarze naturalne, z widocznymi zmarszczkami i unikalnym wyrazem (bez zabiegów medycyny estetycznej zmieniających rysy twarzy)

Masz w rodzinie babcię, dziadka, ciocię lub sąsiada, którzy idealnie pasują do tego opisu? A może to właśnie Ty chcesz wziąć udział w tym projekcie? Pokażmy razem piękno dojrzałości!

📩 **JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?**
Wyślij zgłoszenie na adres e-mail: 
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com
wpisując w tytule SENIOR

- Imię, nazwisko oraz wiek.
- Aktualne, wyraźne zdjęcie twarzy (w naturalnym świetle, bez filtrów!) 
- Numer telefonu do kontaktu

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

items.text:
ANKÜNDIGUNG @Highlight 

ICH BIN DA

Solo-Theaterabend von René Vellin

Premiere: 08. Mai 2027 | 19:30 Uhr
Weitere Vorstellung: 22. Mai 2027 | 19:30 Uhr
Bürgerhaus Lage

„ICH BIN DA“ ist ein emotionaler Solo-Theaterabend über Herkunft, Liebe, Verlust und den Mut, sichtbar zu sein. Mit Humor, Verletzlichkeit und poetischen Musikmomenten erzählt René Vellin von Selbstfindung, Selbstermächtigung und dem Weg zu sich selbst. 

Eine Person auf der Bühne.
Eine Geschichte, die berührt.
Ein Abend über das Ankommen bei sich selbst.

„Vielleicht war ich nie zu viel.
Vielleicht waren andere nur zu wenig.“ 

📍 Bürgerhaus Lage
📅 Premiere: 08. Mai 2027, 19:30 Uhr
📅 Zusatzvorstellung: 22. Mai 2027, 19:30 Uhr

Ein Soloabend voller Geschichten, Musik und Hoffnung – bewegend, ehrlich und nahbar. Dauer ca. 90 Minuten. 

René Vellin – ICH BIN DA
Weil Sichtbarkeit beginnt, wenn wir sagen: Ich bin da.

MIDNIGHT VERANDA — Cinematic Country Wall Of Sound | No Copyright Music | No Content ID

Enter the warm and emotional world of MIDNIGHT VERANDA by Didier Junk — a cinematic instrumental journey through love, memory, longing, quiet summer nights and the timeless beauty of human connection.

Inspired by intimate country ballads, Americana landscapes and monumental Wall Of Sound orchestral storytelling, this soundtrack combines fingerpicked nylon guitar, soft piano, pedal steel guitar, tender fiddle melodies and enormous cinematic orchestral crescendos.

This is music for:
romantic storytelling
country atmosphere videos
cinematic productions
emotional documentaries
Americana visuals
love stories
sunset landscapes
slow travel videos
nostalgic memories
instrumental relaxation

MIDNIGHT VERANDA transforms tenderness, nostalgia and quiet affection into a gigantic cinematic experience filled with warmth, beauty and emotional depth.

This music library is available FREE for creators without Content-ID claims for standard YouTube and social media use.

If you want:
exclusive original tracks
premium cinematic versions
commercial licenses
extended editions
member-only soundtrack collections
direct support for the composer

please consider becoming a channel member of Didier Junk.

Perfect for:
Country Music • Americana • Wall Of Sound • Cinematic Orchestra • Romantic Atmosphere • Emotional Instrumental • Acoustic Guitar • Nostalgic Soundtrack • Love Story Music • Peaceful Relaxation

items.text:
Acting Roadmap for Beginners:
Hey guys, not sure if this is the right platform or not but I’ve seen a few posts here and there about people looking for different classes or getting back into Acting, or starting as an actor etc. so I thought I’d share what I’ve recently put together.  

Ive been acting steadily for the last 25 years - and have nearly 200+ credits across the board. Film & TV, Commercial, Radio, Animation, Video games etc. Worked with Oscar and Emmy winners alike - all that is to say - I have some experience in the area. 😌

People kept asking me about their niece or nephew or a friend that wants to get into Acting, but don’t know where to start.  And I always found myself writing out some long-winded reply with eight or nine different sources or referrals or references - so I decided to create a simple course online - about how to get started as an Actor - that anyone could do at their own pace.  

29 Lessons.  The videos average about 3 minutes each - so it’s very digestible and easy to follow. And I’m always around to answer any questions you might have along the way.  This is something I wish we had when I first started out as an actor.  

I’ll share the link - and hope it can help someone out there.  🙏🫡🎥🎬
