items.text:
COMMERCIAL CASTING CALL- Looking for Male Youth Swimmers, or swim team! Ages 8-15 years old.

My name is Taylor Long, and I'm a Casting Associate with Sean Milliken Casting.

We're currently casting an upcoming insurance commercial and are looking for male youth swimmers, approximately 8–15 years old. We're hoping to cast a full swim team, with opportunities for both featured extras and background roles.

I have a document with more information about the project, including filming dates and details on how parents or guardians can get in touch if they're interested in learning more. Please reach out!

We'd greatly appreciate it if you could share this opportunity with any swimmers or families who may be interested. It could be a fun and exciting experience for young athletes!

Thank you so much for your time and support. If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out, I’d be happy to help!

The financial rates are, if booked as an extra- $300.00 per person or, if upgraded to a featured extra, $2,500 per person.

Warm regards,

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'SEAN MILLIKEN CASTING COMMERCIAL CASTING CALL WE ARE LOOKING FOR: MALE YOUTH SWIM TEAMS- AGED 8-15 YEARS FOR AN INSURANCE COMMERCIAL MUST BE REAL SWIMMERS MUST BE AVAILABLE JUNE 16th-21st FEATURED EXTRA OR EXTRA RATE IF THIS IS YOU, OR ANYONE YOU KNOW, PLEASE EMAIL SMC.ASST@GMAIL.COM'

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED FOR INDIE FEATURE FILM** 🎬

We're looking for **2 volunteer background actors** for a scene in an independent feature film shooting at **Stanley Park**.

**Roles Needed:**
• 1 Female (Age 30–60)
• 1 Male (Age 30–60)
• Ethnicity: Caucasian 

📍 **Location:** Stanley Park, Vancouver
📅 **Date:** June 6, Saturday.
🕒 **Call Time:** 3:00 PM, the shoot will be done in 2hrs.

*Please note that the shooting time may change slightly on the day. We will keep selected participants updated, so please be available and keep your phone nearby.*

**Scene Description:**
Our lead characters are trying to take a selfie together when two friendly passersby offer to help by taking the photo. It's a simple, fun interaction with a small amount of on-camera presence.

• **Volunteer** position
• **Film credit** provided
• **Craft services** (snacks and refreshments) provided

If you're interested, please send us a message with your head shot, showreel, name and age at **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**. Feel free to share this post with anyone who may be a good fit!

**Submission deadline 6th June 2026, 12pm.**

Thank you for supporting independent filmmaking! 🎥

items.text:
Calling all young actors.
We are looking for individuals with a comedic flair or potential to feature in our social media content. Although this is an unpaid opportunity, the videos will be shared and can serve as valuable reels for future productions.

@highlight 

Applicants should be based in Etwatwa or Daveyton and audition via self-tapes, which can be sent to 078 121 4807 via WhatsApp. 

We will review all submissions and be in touch.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'YOUNG ACTORS WANTED! Looking for Comedy Talent! Be Part of My YouTube Channel! No Experience Necessary! BASED IN ETWATWA or DAVEYTON AUDITION THROUGH SELF-TAPES! Record Your Audition & Send It To: 078 0781214807 121 4807 No Pay, But Great For NoPay,ButGreatForYourActingRe Your Acting Reel!'

items.text:
Ready to learn a new skill in a friendly, beginner-focused class? Think it’s too late to begin? - You’re WRONG and it’s going to feel AMAZING when you discover that for yourself! 🥰

.Move more 
.Meet new people (My students are ACE!)
.Start slow and watch yourself improve
.Builds confidence and busts stress!
.Improves mental health & brain function

First time? 

.£3 CLASS MONDAY!
.FREE class on a THURSDAY!

sharedPost.text:
Always something FRESH going on in my class! Whether it’s street, a musical theatre partner number, something lyrical or a festive Christmas group dance, we like to change it up every few weeks. I do this whilst also keeping things at a steady and manageable pace. (It is a class for beginners after all!) 

#beginnersdance #Liverpool #somethingtodo #tryitchallenge #liverpoolfitness

sharedPost.text:
**CASTING CALL**

  We are currently have an amazing opportunity for SA’s for the next shoot coming up in Chester filming for the 1st of 8 feature films for “The Eight Saga N.E.S.T Project” ( post apocalyptic ) 

  The shoot is in Chester and the dates are from the 10th -13th of June and we now have a couple of food sponsors so there will be a hot breakfast and a Chinese every evening for everyone.

 This is unpaid but all will receive an IMDb credit and all will have plenty of time in front of the camera for up to 4 days playing Cannibals filming is a great location.

 Please message me directly ( Simon Hall - Casting Director ) on WhatsApp on 07894943405 and please include a recent head shot ( phone photo is acceptable ), your full name, age & email address and please state how many day/days you are available for on application.

  We are really looking forward to you working with our professional and friendly community.
🎬🎬🎥🎥🤩🤩

Ember Production 
#RainDance #magnificentfilms #filmmaking #postapocalyptic #ukfilmmaker #chester

sharedPost.text:
Małe dzieci dla reklamy Konrada.
Stópki małej dziewczynki

Konrad wie czego chce. W poście dotyczącym castingu pisze o dzieciach obojga płci w zakresie od 6 do 9 lat. W oczy rzuca się jednak różnica w opisie ideału dziewczynki niż chłopca. Ten pierwszy to „Naturalna, urocza, z dużym uśmiechem, jasne oczy, uwielbia się bawić, bez piegów”, a drugi „Blond lub ciemne włosy, jasna skóra. Pogodny, naturalny uśmiech”.

Podczas rozmowy przedstawia się jako osoba, która ma swój projekt i chce go wprowadzić w życie. Nie mówi jednak nic o swoim doświadczeniu, a skupia się tylko na dziecku zainteresowanej. Mama, która z nim rozmawia z początku usłyszawszy jego wymagania, którymi są „(…) bez butów na początek w skarpetkach i w pomieszczeniu” skupia się na trasie, którą porusza się z dzieckiem. Zapytawszy o stawki nie otrzymuje żadnej odpowiedzi, a ogólnik.

Gdy już istnieje możliwość przeprowadzenia rozmowy, ta nadal nie posiada konkretów. Konrad nie nawiązuje do pytania o stawkę i także ogólnikowo informuje o "(..) swoje projekty i reklamę swoich kolekcji, marki.". Nie wysyła żadnych zdjęć swoich produktów i w sumie nic nie ma do przekazania na ten temat. Rozmowa skupia się ponownie na małoletniej.

Gdy mama jednak dopytuje i prosi chociażby o telefon, ten odmawia. Odmawia twierdząc, że to są dane osobowe, a sam dodaje jeszcze, że mama z pewnością też by postąpiła w ten sposób z uwagi na … konkurencję. Rozmowa jednak na tym się kończy.

Konto Konrada działało jednak od jakiegoś czasu. Nazwisko dość enigmatycznie przedstawione jako „Krr”, brak profilowego z twarzą, a tylko barierki pomostu zapewne mola. Brak informacji w ogóle służących jakiemuś uwiarygodnieniu. Zasadniczo, to kompletne zero.

Gdyby jednak sprawdzić, kim jest Konrad, to kilka rzeczy wychodzi na światło dzienne. Konrad ma problemy finansowe, bo daje dużo postów z poszukiwaniem mieszkania pod wynajem, ale bez kaucji. Pilnie także jak mieszkania na parterze, poszukuje pracy, a ta najlepiej, aby była w ochronie parkingu, sklepie, przy drobnych pracach porządkowych, czy też w opiece nad dziećmi. To wszystko tylko za dniówki.

Rozmowa z Konradem następuje także i z mojej strony, ale także bez szczegółów. Krótko po tym i tak kasuje swoje konto. Konrad ponownie znika.

W sytuacji, która jest opisywana w tym poście zawsze należy pytać. Konrad tylko zbywał. Uwiarygodnienie na poziomie zera, a tylko rozmowa o stópkach Twojego dziecka.

Pytajcie i oczekujcie odpowiedzi. Nie idźcie na łatwiznę, czy też z emocjami, które tak jak potrafią być zdradliwe, tak wywołując presję upływającego czasu nieuchronnie prowadzą do podejmowania złych decyzji.

#stópki #weryfikacja #małoletnia #sesjadziecięca

items.title: (no title)

items.text:
**Praktykant/Stażysta ds. Marketingu i Social Media**

Fundacja zajmuje się promowaniem filmu, wspieraniem polskiej kinematografii oraz organizacją wydarzeń filmowych - kin letnich, konkursów, festiwali, przeglądów, a także projektów społecznych (dzielnie i jadłodzielnie). Fundacja kładzie szczególny nacisk na promocję kina polskiego, jak również wsparcie w pozyskaniu licencji filmowych. Więcej informacji: [www.wyswietlfilm.pl](http://www.wyswietlfilm.pl/), [www.eferka.pl](http://www.eferka.pl/).

Temat praktyk:
* współtworzenie i realizacja planów marketingowych dla projektów Fundacji
* wsparcie w obsłudze mediów społecznościowych (przygotowywanie i publikowanie bieżących informacji o wydarzeniach)
* tworzenie estetycznych grafik informacyjnych i promocyjnych w programie Canva
* wsparcie w realizacji bieżących projektów społecznych i kulturalnych

Wymagania:
* znajomość obsługi programu Canva
* język polski
* doświadczenie przy prowadzeniu profili w social media lub organizacji wydarzeń kulturalnych będzie dodatkowym atutem.

Szukamy osób:
* mogących godzinami opowiadać o ulubionych filmach
* kulturalnych i otwartych
* nastawionych na rozwój i nowe wyzwania
* posiadających "lekkie pióro" (umiejętność jasnego formułowania komunikatów)

Jeżeli czytając powyższe widziałeś/widziałaś swoje najlepsze cechy, chętnie zaprosimy Cię na spotkanie, na którym opowiemy o naszej działalności.

Mamy nadzieję, że to właśnie z Tobą będziemy rozwijaćnaszą pasję!

Osoby zainteresowane ofertą prosimy o przesłanie CV na adres: [marketing@wyswietlfilm.pl](mailto:marketing@wyswietlfilm.pl)

Praktyka jest płatna.

MIEJSCE PRACY Warszawa, ul. Czerniakowska 73/79

items.text:
Poszukujemy kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku od 28 do 55 lat do udziału w nagraniach wideo na terenie Trójmiasta. Szukamy osób każdej narodowości!

Kogo szukamy?
Osób mówiących płynnie w języku angielskim (Native Speakerzy mile widziani!).
Wiek: 28–55 lat.
📍 Lokalizacja: Trójmiasto i okolice (warunek konieczny).

Oferujemy:
Płatny udział w ciekawych projektach komercyjnych.
Profesjonalną organizację i świetną atmosferę na planie.

Jak się zgłosić?
Wyślij wiadomość prywatną lub skomentuj post!

📩 Czekamy na zgłoszenia!

items.text:
#casting #shortfilm
ASAP

Casting 4 actors for a 16mm short film. Paid. 

One shooting day in LA, June 12th - 15th. More likely a few hours only.

Please, send a selfie in daylight, reel or video of you speaking/reading a monologue/ poem, resume if you have one.

A Friend( Supporting )

21-26y.o, woman. Naitive Russian  speaker, fluent English required with a minimal or near-native accent. Conventionally attractive. Maude Apatow type. Shoe size 7

Another girl (Supporting )

21-26y.o young black woman. Conventionally attractive. Standard American accent. Couple of lines. 

Quenlin Blackwell type.

Taxi driver (Supporting )

Looking for a Black woman in her 40s-50s with her own car. Real driver for Uber /Lyft preferred.Myra Lucretia Taylor type.

Evicted Women (Featured Background ) 

Background role.White women in her 40s-50s, blonde hair

Hi, I know pay is on the lower end but I’m helping out this vertical. They are looking for 3 people to portray ranchhands. No lines or anything. 

Call time: tomorrow (6/8) at 8:15am

Location: Santa Clarita so must have reliable transportation 

Attire: jeans, t shirts, boots, flannels, maybe even straw hats

Pay: $135/8

Thanks all!

items.text:
Tancerki potrzebne do obłędnej ekipy Tancerze PL - najbliższe zlecenia 6, 13 czerwca 2026. Narazie szukamy osób dostępnych w czerwcu które już z nami tańczyły (!!!) - w tym wypadku dzwońcie do Sylwii: 602406111 . 

Inne Tancerki i Tancerze, którzy chcieliby dołączyć do grupy na stałe - wkrótce ogłosimy casting. Jeśli chcesz się zgłosić już teraz - zaobserwuj naszego instagrama i skomentuj ten post. Następnie wyślij zgłoszenie przez grupa@tamcerze.pl . 

Zlecenia są choreograficzne (Tancerki klubowe, gogo dancers, fordanserki - nie dadzą rady) - próby (na tę chwilę) wyłącznie w Warszawie. Opcjonalnie osoby z 3miasta i okolic.

Uwaga, wyłącznie osoby wszechstronne tanecznie z dobrymi podstawami tańca jazzowego lub klasycznego lub towarzyskiego. Tylko osoby z klasą, i eleganckim, naturalnym wyglądem (przesadnie usta, botox itp - to nie nasza estetyka) 

PS. Jeśli tańczysz tylko high heels, sambę, bachate… dowolną wąską specjalizację - a nie masz podstaw klasycznych - możesz spróbować, ale będzie ciężko dorównać do poziomu grupy. Zaobserwuj nas i poczekaj na casting

items.text:
⚽ PILNY CASTING DO SERIALU „FORWARD” ⚽

Szukamy aktorów i aktorek mieszkających w Warszawie lub okolicach do anglojęzycznego serialu sportowego „FORWARD”.

📍 Zdjęcia: Warszawa
📅 Okres zdjęciowy: 15–24 czerwca
🎬 8 dni zdjęciowych

Poszukujemy osób swobodnie mówiących po angielsku, gotowych przesłać krótkie self-introduction w języku angielskim oraz dostępnych w terminach wskazanych przy rolach.

Wśród ról znajdują się m.in.:
• fanki drużyny piłkarskiej,
• dziennikarz sportowy,
• piłkarze,
• lekarze,
• inwestor Mr. Jones.

Wszystkie role posiadają kwestie dialogowe w języku angielskim.

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany/a udziałem w projekcie, wyślij proszę wiadomość prywatną wraz ze swoim zgłoszeniem.

Czekam na Wasze wiadomości!

Irina
Casting Director

Hello! My name is Termon, and I am a professional circus artist and director from Ethiopia. 

I run a premier circus school representing a diverse group of highly skilled, disciplined, and world-class artists. We specialize in breathtaking acts including:
• [Act 1 - e.g., Acrobatics / Juggling]
• [Act 2 - e.g., Contortion / Aerial Silks]
• [Act 3 - e.g., Hand-balancing / Cyr Wheel]

We are currently available for international contracts, festivals, corporate events, and theater productions. 

👉 View our portfolio/photos:https://www.instagram.com/damobrosstar?igsh=NXlsNHdlOG5uazBn

If you are looking for fresh, high-energy, and elite talent for your1 upcoming shows, I would love to share our promo packages with you. Let’s collaborate!

Best regards,
Termon

Kamed Studio 
1 czerwca poniedziałek 

Na plan współczesnego serialu szukamy mężczyzn w wieku 20-60 lat, którzy wcielą się w rolę pracowników magazynu. 

Gramy w Warszawie 
Stawka 120 zł płatne blik po planie 

Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o zgłoszenia zawierające 
- imię i nazwisko 
- wiek
- nr telefonu 
- aktualne zdjęcie 

na adres 
dorota.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

Dopisek w tytule MAGAZYN

GDYNIA EPIZOD NON PROFIT
Hej!
Do dyplomu studentki UG poszukujemy epizodystów:

- dziewczyna do sceny tańca w klubie z chłopakiem (20-28)
- Barman (25-30)
- 
Nagrywamy w sobotę 06.06 w Gdyni, 9-19.
Zgłoszenie (imię i nazwisko, nr telefonu, miasto, wiek i kilka zdjęć)  proszę wysłać na maila: czlowiekzakochanyshort@gmail.com

items.text:
POSZUKUJEMY STATYSTÓW DO REKLAMY SKLEPU INTERNETOWEGO

Szukamy mężczyzn w wieku 18-45 lat, którzy potrafią grać w piłkę nożną.

Termin realizacji: 5.06
Lokalizacja: Warszawa - Bemowo
Stawka: 150 zł

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy:
**przez formularz w linku:** https://forms.gle/ZUj5B2ixTCEaQpUq7

lub

**mailowo na adres:** ludzie@unagimedia.pl

W tytule wiadomości wpisz: **A5**

W treści maila prosimy o przesłanie:
imienia i nazwiska
wieku
wzrostu
zdjęcia portretowego
zdjęcia sylwetki

Do zobaczenia na planie!

sharedPost.text:
🎭Calling all North Yorkshire based actors!🎭

We are holding a monologue slam Stephen Joseph Theatre on 13th June as a part of @The Scarborough Fringe

To help us get to know professional actors across North Yorkshire we’d love to build connections with you! 

Bring along a piece of your own work or a monologue of your choice.

Get in touch with us to take part www.rocketlines.co.uk

tickets for audience available here:

https://sjt.uk.com/events/scarborough-fringe-monologue-slam

items.text:
Hi all,

I'm helping with casting for an audio series that's in early stages of production.

We're currently looking for audioreels for british mixed-race actresses with a playing age between the ages of 18 and 25 for a lead in a fantasy series.

This would ultimately be a paid opportunity, with aims of completing the first episode by Halloween.

Please comment below, or email tom@portofcall.media with the subject line AUDIO CASTING.

Thanks for reading!

items.text:
FEATURE FILM TABLE READ

Mythological • Science Fiction • Horror

Do you love epic storytelling, powerful characters, ancient mythology, and supernatural suspense?

Trilokam Entertainment is seeking talented actors and performers for an exclusive Zoom table read of an upcoming feature-length Mythological Science Fiction Horror film.

 Indian Actors Preferred  All experience levels welcome  Opportunity to explore unique and compelling characters  Network with fellow actors and creatives

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 DATE June 21, 2026

 TIME 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM

 LOCATION Zoom (Link provided upon selection)

 FORMAT • Complete script read-through • Two full readings of the screenplay • Character exploration and discussion

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 SEEKING ACTORS WHO CAN BRING TO LIFE: • Heroes and Heroines • Mythological Figures • Warriors and Sages • Villains and Supernatural Beings • Modern and Futuristic Characters

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 INTERESTED?

Send your: • Name • Acting Experience (if any) • Headshot or Photo (optional) • Contact Information

TO:

trilokamentertainment@gmail.com

Subject Line: TABLE READ SUBMISSION

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

"Ancient Powers. Future Worlds. Unspeakable Horrors."

Presented by TRILOKAM ENTERTAINMENT

Spaces are limited. Submit today to reserve your opportunity to participate.

Hi! I'm casting for a PAID GIG in Texas, Chicago Area, or Greater Ohio. 

Seeking *REAL* ALLSTATE customers.

PAID • Non Union • Commercial

Dates: 1 shoot day June 23-27 OR Week of July 6, 2026

Must be local in Texas, Chicago Area, or Greater Ohio. 

Are you an Allstate customer who can speak about one of the below experiences?

- Switched from another provider for Home or Auto insurance and saved money

- Purchased Allstate Home Insurance directly through Allstate

- Purchased Allstate Rental Insurance

- Purchased and Experienced Using Allstate Roadside Assistance

- Purchased Allstate Auto Insurance and Roadside Assistance as a bundle

If you are one of the above, apply by filling out the form here: https://rb.gy/miv3i8

LO PASAMOS INCREÍBLE ✨🎶🔥😎

🎥 ¡Inolvidable noche de Cavancha Soul con Luis Jara 🇨🇱!

Cavancha Soul @cavanchasoul fueron teloneras de la presentación del cantante nacional Luis Jara, en el marco de su gira “Más que suerte tour 2026”, anoche en Iquique.

Nuestras artistas locales, además, se subieron al escenario para interpretar junto a Luis Jara un clásico de su repertorio: “No sé olvidarte”.

¡Felicitaciones a Cavancha Soul por el talento y gran presentación! 

🔗 www.tierradedragones.cl #música #iquique #luisjara

items.text:
Some performers command attention.

Others command a room.

We are building a movement ensemble for luxury galas, immersive productions, and special events throughout 2026—and we're looking for artists who understand the difference.

This is not a competition team.

This is not a commercial dance gig.

This is an ensemble built around presence, musicality, elegance, connection, and collective movement.

Under the direction of Denise Coleman, performers will help create sophisticated performance experiences for corporate audiences, immersive productions, and special events across the Midwest.

Current opportunities include:

• Chicago performances
• Immersive productions
• Corporate entertainment engagements
• National Safety Council Green Cross Celebration
Indianapolis | September 14, 2026

We welcome performers from a variety of movement backgrounds, including:

• Contemporary
• Jazz
• Modern
• Ballroom
• Musical Theatre
• Burlesque
• Tap
• Cultural and social dance traditions

We're especially interested in performers who can move fluidly between dance, atmosphere, character, guest interaction, and storytelling.

If you are technically strong, collaborative, adaptable, and capable of creating memorable moments with intention rather than spectacle, we'd love to hear from you.

To apply, submit:

• Resume
• Headshot
• Reel or performance footage

to:

​denisemccoleman@gmail.com​

Selected applicants will be invited to audition.

The room changes when the right people enter it.

— Denise Coleman, Performance Director
— Red Hot Annie, Creative Director

items.groupTitle: Casting For Artists&Dancers Travel All Over The World
items.summary:
Some performers command attention.

Others command a room.

We are building a movement ensemble for luxury galas, immersive productions, and special events throughout 2026—and we're looking for artists who understand the difference.

This is not a competition team.

This is not a commercial dance gig.

This is an ensemble built around presence, musicality, elegance, connection, and collective movement.

Under the direction of Denise Coleman, performers will help create sophisticated performance experiences for corporate audiences, immersive productions, and special events across the Midwest.

Current opportunities include:

• Chicago performances
• Immersive productions
• Corporate entertainment engagements
• National Safety Council Green Cross Celebration
Indianapolis | September 14, 2026

We welcome performers from a variety of movement backgrounds, including:

• Contemporary
• Jazz
• Modern
• Ballroom
• Musical Theatre
• Burlesque
• Tap
• Cultural and social dance traditions

We're especially interested in performers who can move fluidly between dance, atmosphere, character, guest interaction, and storytelling.

If you are technically strong, collaborative, adaptable, and capable of creating memorable moments with intention rather than spectacle, we'd love to hear from you.

To apply, submit:

• Resume
• Headshot
• Reel or performance footage

to:

​denisemccoleman@gmail.com​

Selected applicants will be invited to audition.

The room changes when the right people enter it.

— Denise Coleman, Performance Director
— Red Hot Annie, Creative Director

items.text:
VANCOUVER CASTING CALL: COURTING YOU

Project Type: BookTok/Teaser Trailer

**Compensation: Demo reel material (plus be a part of something fun!)**

**Ideal for actors looking to build romantic lead footage and on-screen chemistry scenes for their demo reel.**

Union Status: **Non-union performers only, please.**

Director/Casting Director: Brianne Hogan

Contact Information: brianne.hogan@gmail.com

Audition Location: Self-tape

Submission Deadline: **June 21, 2026**

Shooting Date: **July 11, 2026**

Shooting Location: Vancouver (TBD)

Shoot Length: Approximately 2–3 hours maximum. 

**SYNOPSIS**

Based on my upcoming e-book, Courting You, this contemporary romantic comedy follows Riley, a 40-year-old woman rebuilding her life after the end of a long-term relationship. Looking for a fresh start, she joins a local tennis club and unexpectedly falls for Hunter, the club's charming 23-year-old tennis instructor. What begins as an unexpected attraction quickly turns into something deeper as both struggle with the realities of their age gap, outside expectations, and the question of whether their connection is worth the risk.

**IMPORTANT NOTE**

Courting You is an age-gap romance between a woman in her 40s and a man in his 20s. Performers should be comfortable portraying romantic attraction, chemistry, and flirtation within this dynamic.

**SCENE BEING FILMED**

The trailer focuses on Riley and Hunter's first meeting at a tennis club. After Hunter accidentally hits Riley with a tennis ball, he rushes over to check on her. The attraction is immediate—until they realize he's the instructor and she's the student.

Tone: Romantic, playful, flirty, contemporary rom-com with strong chemistry and a touch of tension.

**CHARACTER BREAKDOWN**

RILEY (Lead) | Female | 38–45

Riley is a travel writer—independent, adventurous, and globally savvy. Having spent much of her life charting her own course, she's never followed the traditional path expected of women her age. Recently out of a long-term relationship, she's at a crossroads, questioning who she is and what she wants next.

Witty, quirky, and effortlessly relatable, Riley uses humour to navigate uncertainty. When she meets Hunter, what begins as an unexpected attraction quickly becomes something more, forcing her to reconsider the future she thought she wanted.

Personality: Intelligent, warm, self-aware, dry sense of humour, emotionally guarded but hopeful.

HUNTER (Lead) | Male | 22–27

Hunter is a former elite junior tennis player who walked away from his professional ambitions to pursue a law degree. Freshly graduated, he's caught between the life he's always been told he should want and the freedom he's beginning to crave.

Responsible, level-headed, and naturally caring, Hunter has spent most of his life meeting expectations—particularly those of his parents. Beneath his calm exterior is someone eager to experience adventure, take risks, and discover who he is outside of everyone else's plans for him.

Meeting Riley awakens a side of himself he's never fully explored.

Personality: Confident but grounded, compassionate, dependable, mature beyond his years, quietly charismatic.

Requirements: Must be comfortable and believable playing an experienced tennis player. Strong tennis skills preferred. Height 6'0"+. Must be comfortable appearing shirtless for portions of the shoot.

CHEMISTRY BETWEEN LEADS

Riley and Hunter share an immediate, undeniable connection. Their dynamic is playful, flirtatious, and emotionally authentic, with strong romantic tension.

Casting Note: Chemistry between leads is the most important element of this project. Performers should be able to convey attraction, warmth, humour, and emotional depth with minimal dialogue.

**TO SUBMIT**
** Please send the following to: brianne.hogan@gmail.com**

**• Headshot**
** • Resume (if available)**
** • Recent photo(s)**
** • Brief note outlining any tennis experience**
** • Demo reel (optional)**
** • Optional: a short introduction telling us why you're interested in the role**

**Subject Line: *****Courting You – [Riley / Hunter]***

items.text:
Ready to learn a new skill in a friendly, beginner-focused class? Think it’s too late to begin? - You’re WRONG and it’s going to feel AMAZING when you discover that for yourself! 🥰

.Move more 
.Meet new people (My students are ACE!)
.Start slow and watch yourself improve
.Builds confidence and busts stress!
.Improves mental health & brain function

First time? 

.£3 CLASS MONDAY!
.FREE class on a THURSDAY!

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam:

- „Kocur” (38) – bezwzględny i wyrachowany gangster. 5 scen – PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 24.06. 25.06 i 26.06
Stawka: 1800 zł netto za 3 dni

- Włamywacz (43) – profesjonalny złodziej, wygląd kryminalisty. 3 sceny
Data: 25.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto

- Grzesiak (51) – zresocjalizowany włamywacz. 1 scena 
Data: 26.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto

- Mariusz Darowski (41) – Typ biznesmena przy kasie. Były dystrybutor fentanylu. Po odsiadce nie wrócił do przestępczego życia. 4 sceny – PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 24.06 i 25.06
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za 2 dni

- Właścicielka motelu (29) – Wystraszona śmiercią dziewczyny. Jest świadkiem. 3 sceny 
Data: 26.06
Stawka: 500 zł netto

- Cyngiel 1 (30) – płatny zabójca, sprawny fizycznie kryminalista. 4 sceny
 Data: 26.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto

- Cyngiel 2 (40) – płatny zabójca, w formie. Opanowany i profesjonalny. 4 sceny
Data: 26.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
# CASTING CALL: "CASTAWAY" (Short Film)

**Project Type:** Short Film (LGBTQIA+ / Latinx Drama)

**Union Status:** Non-Union / Union

**Rate:** $250/Day (Estimated 3 days of filming)
**Language: **Spanish/English

**Location:** Chicago, IL

**Submission Deadline:** July 25, 2026
## ABOUT THE PROJECT

*Castaway* follows the story of Victor, a conservative man who makes the heartbreaking decision to cast out his teenage son, Jaime, due to his own traditional values and beliefs. When Victor begins to quietly question the beliefs that once defined him, he is pulled into a private reckoning. His marriage begins to crumble under the weight of his growing guilt and humanity.

## ROLES AVAILABLE
[SOFIA] — Main Talent
* **Ethnicity:** Latinx/ Latin America
* **Age Range:** 40–55 years old
* **Character Bio:** Sofia is the respected president of her parish council and carries herself with elegance, confidence, and authority. She is deeply devoted to her faith and community, often appearing composed and in control. Years ago, Sofia made a decision that fractured her relationship with her son. Her dedication to representing her faith and community has become both a source of strength and a shield against painful truths.
## KEY DATES & AUDITION INFO
* **Filming Timeline:** EST. 3 days total (Dates TBD and will be in either August, September, or October)
* **Audition Process:** Virtual callbacks for principal roles will be held via Google Meet.
## HOW TO APPLY

Please submit your headshot, resume, and reel via our Backstage submission link below:

[https://www.backstage.com/casting/castaway-3173616/](https://www.backstage.com/casting/castaway-3173616/)

*Local Chicago & Midwest talent is highly preferred.*

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'A FILMBY NATHAN NATHANL.MARQUEZ L. MARQUEZ CaRTaиa asta u An LGB LGBTQ+ away Shoft astaway AnLGBTQ+Short oy shom Film'

The Dinner Detective is currently casting!

All roles paid and scheduling happens one month at a time based on your availability!

To be considered for the virtual audition, you must email your pic and resume to dinnerdetectiveauditions@gmail.com with your audition city in the subject line. If selected, you will then receive a character breakdown, show pay details and an audition form to fill out and send back.

items.text:
#casting #shortfilm
ASAP

Casting 4 actors for a 16mm short film. Paid. 

One shooting day in LA, June 12th - 15th. More likely a few hours only.

Please, send a selfie in daylight, reel or video of you speaking/reading a monologue/ poem, resume if you have one.

A Friend( Supporting )

21-26y.o, woman. Naitive Russian  speaker, fluent English required with a minimal or near-native accent. Conventionally attractive. Maude Apatow type. Shoe size 7

Another girl (Supporting )

21-26y.o young black woman. Conventionally attractive. Standard American accent. Couple of lines. 

Quenlin Blackwell type.

Taxi driver (Supporting )

Looking for a Black woman in her 40s-50s with her own car. Real driver for Uber /Lyft preferred.Myra Lucretia Taylor type.

Evicted Women (Featured Background ) 

Background role.White women in her 40s-50s, blonde hair
